name: Stickman: Hooks
description: Get ready to swing into action with Stickman: Hooks! Tap to hook, make incredible jumps, and execute perfect acrobatic tricks to avoid every obstacle that stands in your way. Master the physics-based gameplay to swing from hook to hook like a pro, building momentum to fly across the finish line. Web Dev https://www.crazygamesx.com/
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
